variants: Currently living in Newtleaf Hamlet, Aleksandr Filatov was born in Heronrift Village, where his fascination with the outdoors began. He pursued higher education at the Mirthwood Institute, developing his skills in exploration. Aleksandr is an employee at Talondrift Adventures, where he has shared his passion for nature with many. His commitment to adventure education has been recognized through the prestigious Solaria Crest, an honor awarded for his contributions in the field.
